projectDescription: A curated catalog of static analysis tools, linters, and formatters for all programming languages, config files, and build tools — focused on improving code quality.
keyFeatures: 750+ curated static analysis tools across all major programming languages
Machine-readable JSON API for all tool data
Rust-based renderer that generates README and JSON from YAML sources
Rich tool metadata: license, categories, tags, types, deprecation status
Coverage of linters, formatters, SAST tools, and meta-linters
Supports languages from C/C++ to Python, Go, Rust, Java, JavaScript and more
Categorized by language, framework, config format, and security focus
publicApiSurface: data/tools/*.yml — YAML source files for each tool entry
data/api/tools.json — machine-readable JSON of all tools
data/api/tags.json — machine-readable JSON of all tags
make render — generates README.md and JSON API from YAML sources
make render-skip-deprecated — renders without deprecated tools
ParsedEntry fields: name, categories, tags, license, types, homepage, source, description, deprecated
ApiEntry fields: name, categories, languages, other, licenses, types, homepage, source, description
Category enum: linter, formatter, performance, meta
ToolType enum: cli, gui, service, ide-plugin
